title: Walk-in Drive Category Manager at Axe India

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Category Manager at Axe India
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Category Manager with drive and ambition, Axe India in Gurgaon is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Axe India:
Axe India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Axe India!
